ext.description: Compare git branches, review editable diffs, resolve conflicts, and draft AI commit/PR messages.
view.changes.name: Changes
view.conflicts.name: Conflicts
viewContainer.title: Git Simple Compare
welcome.conflicts:
No conflicts to resolve.
If an operation is in progress, you can [Continue](command:gitSimpleCompare.continueOperation) or [Abort](command:gitSimpleCompare.abortOperation). During rebase, [Skip](command:gitSimpleCompare.skipOperation) is also available.
config.diffBase.desc: Diff base used when comparing branches.
config.diffBase.twoDot: Compare the two branch tips directly (base..target).
config.diffBase.threeDot: Compare against the common ancestor (base...target, PR-review style).
config.includeRemote.desc: Include remote branches in the branch picker.
config.hunkControl.desc: Controls how line staging controls are shown in the native HEAD ↔ Working Tree diff.
config.hunkControl.nativeOverlay: Show real checkbox controls in the native diff margin.
config.hunkControl.command: Show no inline controls. Use editor title/context commands for selected lines.
config.blameLine.show.desc: Show Git blame text before each line in the active editor.
config.pullRequestComments.show.desc: Show GitHub pull request review comments in the active editor.
config.aiCliProvider.desc: AI CLI provider used for commit and pull request message generation.
config.aiCliProvider.auto: Try Claude Code first, then Codex.
config.aiClaudeCommand.desc: Claude Code executable name or absolute path.
config.aiClaudeModel.desc: Claude Code model selected from the installed CLI metadata. Leave empty to use the CLI default.
config.aiClaudeEffort.desc: Claude Code reasoning effort passed with --effort. Leave empty to use the CLI default.
config.aiClaudeSystemPrompt.desc: Optional prompt appended to Claude Code with --append-system-prompt.
config.aiClaudeLoginMode.desc: Claude Code login command used by the AI CLI login action.
config.aiClaudeLoginMode.setupToken: Set up a long-lived token when browser callback login fails.
config.aiCodexCommand.desc: Codex executable name or absolute path.
config.aiCodexModel.desc: Codex model selected from the installed CLI model catalog. Leave empty to use the CLI default.
config.aiCodexReasoningEffort.desc: Codex reasoning effort passed with model_reasoning_effort. Leave empty to use the CLI default.
config.aiCodexProfile.desc: Optional Codex configuration profile passed with --profile.
config.aiCodexLoginMode.desc: Codex login command used by the AI CLI login action.
config.aiCodexLoginMode.device: Use device authentication. Recommended when browser callback login fails.
config.aiCodexLoginMode.apiKey: Read OPENAI_API_KEY from the terminal environment.
config.aiCodexLoginMode.accessToken: Read CODEX_ACCESS_TOKEN from the terminal environment.
config.aiEffort.default: Use the provider CLI default reasoning effort.
config.aiEffort.max: Maximum reasoning effort when supported by the provider.
config.aiResponseLanguage.desc: Language for AI-generated commit, pull request, and rebase messages.
config.aiCommonInstructions.desc: Extra prompt instructions applied to commit, pull request, and rebase AI generation.
config.aiCommitInstructions.desc: Extra prompt instructions applied only to commit message generation.
config.aiPullRequestInstructions.desc: Extra prompt instructions applied only to pull request title/body generation.
config.aiRebaseInstructions.desc: Extra prompt instructions applied only to AI rebase plan generation.
config.aiCliTimeoutMs.desc: Timeout in milliseconds for AI CLI requests.
